text: - (a) In monthly payments equal to 100% of labor performed and materials in place based on percentage of completion of work hereunder as estimated and approved by the Architect and Owner. Billings shall be received by the 25th of the month for payment, and shall be presented on AIA Document No. G702 with a Schedule of Values that must be approved at the sole discretion of the of the Contractor before monthly pay application is  submitted.
